ILPsolver.description: ILP solver used. grb/gurobi with gurobipy is recommended; pulp is not guaranteed to match strict legal-placement behavior

thermal_solver.description: thermal solver used, supporting HotSpot and ATSim now

thermal_dir.description: path to the directory of the thermal solver

reso_interposer.description: resolution of interposer, the minimum manufacture size, typically <1mm, unit: um

dis_bet_chips.description: distance between chiplets, typically <0.2mm, unit: um

num_bins_x.description: number of bins in horizontal direction; computed by internal heuristic if not specified

num_bins_y.description: number of bins in vertical direction; computed by internal heuristic if not specified

num_grid_x.description: number of grids in horizontal direction of thermal simulation

num_grid_y.description: number of grids in vertical direction of thermal simulation

floorplan_stages.description: floorplan configurations of each stage, a dictionary of {"num_bins_x", "num_bins_y", "iteration", "learning_rate", "learning_rate_decay", "wirelength", "optimizer", "Llambda_density_weight_iteration", "Lsub_iteration"}

ignore_net_degree.description: ignore net degree larger than some value

gp_noise_ratio.description: noise to initial positions for global placement

stop_overflow.description: stopping criteria, consider stop when the overflow reaches to a ratio

plot_freq.description: plot and print solution frequency, <0 is not

RePlAce_ref_hpwl.description: reference HPWL used for updating density weight

OVLP_LOWER_PCOF.description: lower bound ratio used for updating density weight

OVLP_UPPER_PCOF.description: upper bound ratio used for updating density weight

eta.description: coefficient in the exp relation of theta

random_center_init_flag.description: whether perform random initialization around the center for global placement
